case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. LEONARD HOBBS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: OF AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HOBBS, LEONARD DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HOBBS, LEONARD
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED OCT-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOBBS, LEONARD
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HOBBS, LEONARD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOBBS, LEONARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 O'FARRELL STREET, #626, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $16.76 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HOBBS, LEONARD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HOBBS, LEONARD
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HOBBS, LEONARD
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HOBBS, LEONARD
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
